public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as oath witness.
appearance: Vekka Glassmelt usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their oath witness status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a oath witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of oath witness in and around Rebuilding Oath Courts, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Rebuilding Oath Courts workable through the obligations of oath witness while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Rebuilding Oath Courts, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of oath witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vekka Glassmelt can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.
Vekka Glassmelt can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Vekka Glassmelt communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Rebuilding Oath Courts: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a oath witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Oath Witness, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Vekka Glassmelt refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Oath Witness too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vekka Glassmelt can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vekka Glassmelt adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vekka Glassmelt is Known locally through day-to-day work as oath witness. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Oath Witness.
